name: Step-Tagging: Toward controlling the generation of Language Reasoning Models through step monitoring
summary: arXiv:2512.14332v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The field of Language Reasoning Models (LRMs) has been very active over the past few years with advances in training and inference techniqu...
description: arXiv:2512.14332v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The field of Language Reasoning Models (LRMs) has been very active over the past few years with advances in training and inference techniques enabling LRMs to reason longer, and more accurately. However, a growing body of studies show that LRMs are still inefficient, over-generating verification and reflection steps. To address this chal...
author: Yannis Belkhiter, Seshu Tirupathi, Giulio Zizzo, John D. Kelleher
